description: Valid ZRead search_doc response (sanitized). Multiple ordered <excerpt> blocks with arbitrary inner Markdown/code/HTML-like markup spanning excerpt boundaries.
raw: ## useState `useState` is a Hook that lets you add state to function components. ```js const [count, setCount] = useState(0); ``` See Hooks reference. ### Updates and batching State updates may be batched. The following snippet shows the documented batching rule: - functional updates preserve identity - object spreads create new identities Plain prose excerpt with no markup at all.
